nasb.text: In Tehaphnehes the day will be dark When I break there the yoke bars of Egypt. Then the pride of her power will cease in her; A cloud will cover her, And her daughters will go into captivity.

esv.text: At Tehaphnehes the day shall be dark, when I break there the yoke bars of Egypt, and her proud might shall come to an end in her; she shall be covered by a cloud, and her daughters shall go into captivity.

cnv.text: 我在答比匿折斷埃及眾軛的時候， 白晝就必變為黑暗； 埃及所誇耀的勢力必在其中止息； 這城必有密雲遮蓋， 城中的居民必被擄去。

ccb.text: 我粉碎埃及势力的那天， 答比匿日月无光， 她的锐气全消。 乌云要笼罩她， 她城邑的居民要被掳去。
